executives.name: Jan van Eck
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Van Eck Associates Corporation, Van Eck Securities Corporation and Van Eck Absolute Return Advisers, Inc. since 2010.

executives.name: James Rathgey
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer of Van Eck Associates Corporation since 2023; previously Head of Global Operations.

executives.name: John Crimmins
executives.background: Treasurer of Van Eck Associates Corporation, Van Eck Securities Corporation and Van Eck Absolute Return Advisers, Inc. since 2009.

executives.name: Jonathan Simon
executives.background: Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Van Eck Associates Corporation since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Jan van Eck
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Van Eck Associates Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Kathleen LaBounty
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee; previously Managing Director at various financial institutions.

board_of_directors.name: Alastair Short
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee; Consultant and former executive in the asset management industry.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Sidebottom
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee; Managing Partner of a strategic consulting firm.
